issues.title: Project modal won't close (× button broken)
issues.desc: Clicking a project card opens the design preview, but the × close button does not respond.
issues.workaround: Press Esc on your keyboard, or tap anywhere outside the preview card to dismiss it.

issues.title: Not all designs are displayed
issues.desc: The Projects section currently shows a limited selection of work due to layout constraints.
issues.workaround: Reach out via the Contact section and I'll send you a direct link to the full portfolio.
